---
title: "Projects"
description: "Research and software projects spanning antimicrobial resistance, antibiotic PK/PD, antimicrobial pharmacometrics, Monte Carlo simulation, virtual populations, bacterial modeling, clinical microbiology, and reproducible research."
keywords: "antimicrobial resistance, bacterial modeling, antibiotic PK/PD, antimicrobial pharmacometrics, Monte Carlo simulation, virtual populations, clinical microbiology, reproducible research"
---

## Featured Projects

:::{.grid}

::: {.g-col-12}
::: {.project-card}
<div class="project-status">Active Research · Manuscript Under Submission</div>

### [Ceftazidime–Avibactam Evidence-Composite PK/PD Modeling](projects/caz-avi-evidence-composite-pkpd.qmd)

A provenance-aware computational framework for converting fragmented ceftazidime–avibactam evidence into simulation-ready pharmacometric components. The project integrates component-specific clearance models, renal-function covariates, correlated variability, virtual populations, joint PK/PD targets, PTA, CFR, toxicity screening, calibration, convergence analysis, and probabilistic sensitivity analysis.

<div class="project-tags">
<span class="project-tag">Antibiotic PK/PD</span>
<span class="project-tag">Antimicrobial Resistance</span>
<span class="project-tag">Pharmacometrics</span>
<span class="project-tag">Monte Carlo Simulation</span>
<span class="project-tag">Virtual Populations</span>
<span class="project-tag">Reproducible Research</span>
<span class="project-tag">Python</span>
</div>

[Deep Dive →](projects/caz-avi-evidence-composite-pkpd.qmd){.project-link}  [View Repository →](https://github.com/piranfar/caz-avi-evidence-composite-pkpd){.project-link}

<p class="project-note"><em>Methodological research framework; not a clinical dosing or decision-support tool.</em></p>
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12}
::: {.project-card}
<div class="project-status">Active</div>

### [AI Bacteriology Hub](projects/ai-bacteriology-hub.qmd)

A production-grade full-stack research platform combining a curated bacteriology knowledge base, an **AI Research Layer** for interactive AMR reasoning, and **manifest-driven Python lab tools** executed inside a Docker sandbox. Features a server-side AI proxy, streaming SSE responses, an AI Orchestrator for automated lab app upgrades, and deployment on Google Cloud Run.

<div class="project-tags">
<span class="project-tag">Django + DRF</span>
<span class="project-tag">React 18</span>
<span class="project-tag">AI Research Layer</span>
<span class="project-tag">Docker Sandbox</span>
<span class="project-tag">Google Cloud Run</span>
<span class="project-tag">AMR</span>
</div>

[Deep Dive →](projects/ai-bacteriology-hub.qmd){.project-link}  [Live Site →](https://ai-bacteriology.vahhabpiranfar.com/){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
<div class="project-status">Active</div>

### [Crossref Reference Formatter](https://piranfar.github.io/Crossref-Reference-Formatter/)

Paste Crossref references and export Vancouver-style linked citations. Converts bibliographic metadata into formatted citations with rich text, Word, and HTML export options.

<div class="project-tags">
<span class="project-tag">JavaScript</span>
<span class="project-tag">Crossref API</span>
<span class="project-tag">Citation Formatting</span>
</div>

[View Project →](https://piranfar.github.io/Crossref-Reference-Formatter/){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
<div class="project-status">Active</div>

### [FluentBridge AI](https://github.com/piranfar/english-learning)

Local-first AI English tutor for Persian-speaking learners preparing for academic English and TOEFL. Two-stage learning journey with grammar lessons, reading/listening/writing/speaking coaches, shadowing, SRS vocabulary, and a Mistake Clinic — powered by a provider-agnostic AI layer (Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic).

<div class="project-tags">
<span class="project-tag">Django + DRF</span>
<span class="project-tag">React 19</span>
<span class="project-tag">Vite</span>
<span class="project-tag">Ollama</span>
<span class="project-tag">TOEFL Prep</span>
</div>

[View on GitHub →](https://github.com/piranfar/english-learning){.project-link}
:::
:::

:::

## Project Archive

A collection of work spanning clinical microbiology research, bioinformatics, and data science applications.

| Project | Category | Description |
|---------|----------|-------------|
| **[Ceftazidime–Avibactam Evidence-Composite PK/PD Modeling](projects/caz-avi-evidence-composite-pkpd.qmd)** | Antimicrobial Pharmacometrics | Provenance-aware Monte Carlo PK/PD framework for joint ceftazidime and avibactam target attainment, PTA, CFR, calibration, and uncertainty analysis |
| **[AI Bacteriology Hub](projects/ai-bacteriology-hub.qmd)** | AI / Full-Stack | Full-stack computational microbiology platform with AI Research Layer, manifest-driven lab tools, and Docker sandboxed execution |
| **USCIS Tracker** | Data Science | Automated USCIS case monitoring with real-time updates and analytics |
| **Crossref Reference Formatter** | Research Tools | Vancouver-style citation export from Crossref metadata |
| **[FluentBridge AI](https://github.com/piranfar/english-learning)** | AI / Full-Stack | Local-first AI English tutor for TOEFL and academic English with multi-skill coaches and provider-agnostic AI |
| **Molecular Dynamics Studies** | Bioinformatics | GROMACS simulations of drug-resistant pathogen interactions |
| **Clinical Diagnostics Pipeline** | Microbiology | Automated pathogen identification and reporting systems |

---

## Research & Publications

For detailed information about my academic work and publications, visit the [Publications page](publications.qmd).

## Let's Collaborate

Interested in discussing a project or exploring collaboration opportunities? Reach out via [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/vahhab-piranfar/) or check out my [GitHub profile](https://github.com/piranfar).
